ws-1a.name: Shared Types & Constants
ws-1a.brief: Set up the shared TypeScript types and constants used across the extension and dashboard.
ws-1a.doneWhen: Types compile, constants are importable, and no circular imports exist.

ws-2a.name: Plan Parser
ws-2a.brief: Build the plan parser that converts markdown plans into structured JSON.
ws-2a.doneWhen: Parser extracts work streams, dependencies, and time slots from markdown. Validation rejects invalid plans.

ws-2b.name: Agent Dispatcher
ws-2b.brief: Build the agent dispatcher that launches and monitors agents per work stream.
ws-2b.doneWhen: Dispatcher can launch a mock agent, track its status, and report completion.
